title: Danny's Christmas Chocolate friends - 3 x Medium 50g Bars Selection in a Gift Box - Santa, Reindeer & Snowman - Secret Santa Gifts and Stocking Fillers - Christmas Eve Box Fillers
features: 🎅 3 MEDIUM CHRISTMAS BARS - This high quality XMAS chocolate selection includes 3 x 50g bars topped with Danny's Friends, Santa, Snaowman & Reindeer, perfect for either children or adults. Each bar is 50 grams scrummy of Christmas indulgence!
🎄 PERFECT FOR GIFTS - These crimbo themed bars are perfect stocking fillers, a secret santa gift, Christmas Eve boxes, Teachers gifts or a present for the kids or a loved one.

☃️ TASTES GREAT - With smooth ethically and sustainably sourced Premium Single Origin 41% Cacao content and all the way from Colombia Danny’s family made mighty milk chocolate , it’s not your average Christmas choccy. Once you taste it you won't actually want to give it away, so we recommend you buy these 3 bars for yourself too!
🎁 UPGRADE - Why not have an upgrade on the yearly selection box ! This festive fun set of 3 bars will add something different to this years stocking or add them to a homemade hamper !

❄️ DANNYS - Fun everyday chocolate for all the family. Dannys make sure that the chocolate is made with a cheeky sense of humour, and to ensure the ingredients aren't being scrimped on, they make all their chocolate in the family run factory here in the UK.
description: From the brand Previous page The Danny’s brand was born in 2007 when husband and wife team, Ken and Jen Harrison decided to start their own chocolate making business and name it after their first born son - Daniel! From humble beginnings, the family business has grown and now runs from their very own factory in Stoke on Trent. Despite this amazing growth , the business remains family owned with 3 generations helping to build its success. We hope you enjoy it! CHRISTMAS TREATS Visit the store CHOCOLATE BARS FOR CHRISTMAS Visit the store DUBAI CHOCOLATE BARS Inspired by a family trip to Dubai, Danny created his own twist on an unforgettable treat! Crispy, golden knafeh pastry and crunchy pistachios, filled with rich gooey goodness, all wrapped in his signature Colombian chocolate. Crunch, chew, and enjoy! ALL YEAR ROUND GIFTS Visit the store Making Mischief Since 2007 Welcome to DANNY’s core range of fun chocolate bars. Featuring a full range of exciting flavours in 15 different 80g versions. WHAT WE”RE ALL ABOUT? Everyday treat chocolate bars made using the best Single Origin Colombian Cacao which is ethically and sustainably produced Are our products high quality? With a higher Cacao content than competitor mainstream brands - 40% minimum cacao solids, our bars a great deliver a great tasting CHOCOLATE treat with less sugar What makes our products unique? Made in Stoke on Trent, by Danny and his family in their very own factory. Fun, friendly, quirky and made with skill, care and a bit of healthy mischief - putting a smile on people faces. Next page
